error_signature: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'json')
title: Error parsing response due to wrong password in PDFco node
symptom: When a wrong password is passed to the PDFco node, it results in a TypeError and halts execution without a way to continue.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node
root_cause: The PDFco node fails to handle the error response correctly when an invalid password is provided. This leads to an attempt to access properties of an undefined object, causing a TypeError.
fix_steps: Check the password being used in the PDFco node
Ensure the password is correct and valid
Test the node again after correcting the password
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the password used in the PDFco node settings.
